positive: A stylized, retro vaporwave cityscape viewed from a slight elevation. The scene features overlapping geometric shapes, stylized palm trees, and a vibrant, glowing digital sunset over a crystalline ocean. The color palette emphasizes deep sapphire blue, neon magenta, cyan, and electric purple. The style should mimic mid-century modern graphic design mixed with 8-bit aesthetics, achieving high contrast and clean, sharp silhouettes suitable for a repeating seamless pattern print. Central composition, graphic vector style, highly detailed linework, perfect symmetry, clean lines, designed for apparel printing.
negative: low resolution, grainy, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, noisy, blur, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, malformed hands, out of frame, monochrome, grayscale
